The Church of Evolution is the only currently existing [[Lifeism|Evolutionist]] organization. It was founded by [[Kamidere|Immanuelle]] in 2022 in reaction to the [[2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine]], 

See [[Lifeism 1.0]] for more info on the current state of it and its institutions, and see [[Lifeism 2.0]] for future plans 

It was originally called the Church of Evolution, but briefly changed its name in response to the idea that Church implied a more Abrahamic inspired structure, while School helps demonstrate the structure which involves taking [[classes]] and is more inspired by [[universities]] than by Christian Churches. Later it was judged the branding difference was negligible and it was changed back on October 30 2021 
[[Category:Lifeism]]
[[sn:Church of Evolution]][[Category:The Pride]]
[[Category:Church of Evolution]]
[[sn:Church of Evolution]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
